input: Validate EGFR as a drug target for NSCLC. Full 10-phase assessment.

expected_details.rationale: Clinically validated target with multiple approved TKIs, strong genetic evidence, high druggability

input: Validate KRAS G12D as a drug target for pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma.

expected_details.rationale: Strong disease association but historically undruggable; G12D inhibitors only now entering clinic; no approved G12D-specific drugs

input: Validate PCSK9 as a drug target for familial hypercholesterolemia and ASCVD.

expected_details.rationale: Exceptional human genetic validation (LOF = low LDL + cardioprotection); multiple approved modalities (mAb, siRNA)

input: Validate GRK2 as a drug target for heart failure.

expected_details.rationale: Preclinical evidence only; no selective inhibitors in clinic; kinase selectivity challenge

input: Validate BCL-2 as a drug target for CLL.
expected_tier: Tier 1 — GO or Tier 2 — CONDITIONAL GO

expected_details.rationale: Venetoclax validated; BH3 mimetic class proven; TLS safety concern manageable with ramp-up

input: Validate tau protein (MAPT) as a drug target for Alzheimer's disease.

expected_details.rationale: Strong disease association (tau correlates with cognition) but multiple clinical failures; intracellular target; BBB challenge

input: Validate PD-1 (PDCD1) as a drug target for solid tumors broadly.

expected_details.rationale: Most commercially successful oncology target; multiple approved agents; broad tumor-type applicability

input: Validate Claudin 18.2 (CLDN18.2) as a drug target for gastric adenocarcinoma.

expected_details.rationale: Zolbetuximab validated in late-stage trials; restricted normal tissue expression is favorable; multiple modalities in development

input: Validate GPBAR1 (TGR5) as a drug target for MASH/NASH.

expected_details.rationale: GPCR class is tractable but limited human genetic evidence; gallbladder safety concern; no clinical candidates advanced

input: Validate HER2 (ERBB2) as a drug target for HER2-positive breast cancer.

expected_details.rationale: Paradigm-defining target; trastuzumab, pertuzumab, T-DXd, tucatinib all approved; multiple modalities validated
